ANNOUNCEMENT

I'm writing a fic.

I can't guarantee it'll be good because I've never written a full fic before! But it's going to follow Ghost and Soap in this exact scenario: Alpha Ghost and Alpha Soap...until Soap has to take Omega hormones to be the team bitch. :) You can find my fic here:

Thanks for the year of support, comments, and fun. Here's to another! 🥂
